system:
You answer questions about a synthetic world using ONLY the provided episode excerpts.

Episode statements and their exact semantics:
- Observation "valid from day X": the fact holds at EVERY day >= X, forever. Facts never expire on their own.
- Observation "valid from day X until day Y": the fact holds for X <= day < Y.
- Policy (IF conditions THEN conclusion): at the evaluation day, if all conditions hold (matching shared variables like ?A consistently), the conclusion holds. Policies chain: a conclusion may satisfy another policy's condition.
- A policy applies only from its effective day onward, and only if not superseded.
- UNLESS exception: if the exception pattern is satisfiable for that binding, the policy does not fire for it.
- Supersession notice: from the stated day, the old policy stops applying (entirely, or only for bindings matching the stated condition). A superseded policy's conclusions are gone from that day unless re-derivable another way.
- Higher authority policies beat lower authority ones when they conflict; later-issued beats earlier at equal authority.

Answering:
- The question names the evaluation day. Evaluate at exactly that day.
- Answer true only if the fact is stated valid at that day or derivable via policies from facts valid at that day. Otherwise answer false.
- For true/false questions reply with exactly one word: true or false.
- For list questions reply with ONLY a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

=== Episode ep_225 (day 106) ===
On day 104, registry_B records fct_0733 as valid from day 104: partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_08, sector=sector_05).
registry_A’s entry fct_0823, logged on day 104 and effective from day 104, notes located_in(partner=partner_19, partner2=partner_25).
A field_report observation, fct_0762, logged on day 105 and effective from day 105, shows rated_as(asset=asset_11, partner=partner_25).
On day 106, product_14 stated: "registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_08, asset=asset_06, customer=customer_09)" — recorded as fct_1028.

=== Episode ep_208 (day 90) ===
A customer_disclosure entry logged on day 88, filed as fct_0467 and in force from day 88, attests that supplies(customer=customer_05, asset=asset_07).
Day 89’s registry_A intake, reference fct_0610, effective from day 89, records that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_08, asset=asset_12, customer=customer_01).
On day 89, product_23 submitted forecast fct_1033, projecting that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_06, asset=asset_13, customer=customer_05) will hold.
From registry_B on day 90, fct_0059, valid from day 90, establishes that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_14, asset=asset_03, customer=customer_04).
The partner_feed on day 90 gave us fct_0104, in effect from day 90: registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_01, asset=asset_05, customer=customer_12).

=== Episode ep_300 (day 240) ===
On day 238, audit_note observation fct_0913, in force from day 238, records that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_18, asset=asset_05, customer=customer_04).
Logged on day 239, policy rul_030 ("flagged_for policy 2 (revised)"), at authority level 1, takes effect from day 239: IF rated_as(asset=?A, partner=?C) AND member_of(sector=?B, sector2=?D, asset=?A) THEN flagged_for(asset=?A, sector=?B), UNLESS rated_as(asset=?A, partner=partner_11) OR partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_03, sector=?B).
Day 239 also sees notice sup_006 enter the log, specifying that rul_030 supersedes rul_016 effective day 239, after which rul_016 no longer applies.
On day 240, audit_note logs fct_0770, effective from day 240: rated_as(asset=asset_08, partner=partner_08).
product_16, on day 240, filed forecast fct_1031, expecting offered_in(asset=asset_05, customer=customer_10) to hold in the future.

=== Episode ep_315 (day 286) ===
[day 285] Observation (fct_0760, source field_report, valid from day 285): rated_as(asset=asset_06, partner=partner_09).
[day 286] Policy rul_038 ("restricted_in policy 2 (revised)", authority level 4, effective from day 286): IF partnered_with(jurisdiction=?A, sector=?C) AND partnered_with(jurisdiction=?A, sector=?B) AND supplies(customer=?D, asset=?E) THEN restricted_in(jurisdiction=?A, sector=?B), UNLESS operates_in(customer=?D, sector=sector_02, customer2=customer_11) OR partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_17, sector=?B).
[day 286] Notice sup_014: policy rul_005 is superseded by policy rul_038, effective day 286. From that day, rul_005 no longer applies.

=== Episode ep_294 (day 225) ===
In a submission dated day 222, product_16 asserts that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12, asset=asset_00, customer=customer_09).
A partner_feed observation, logged as fct_0627 on day 224 and effective from day 224, notes that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12, asset=asset_07, customer=customer_12).
product_16 declared on day 224, "member_of(sector=sector_13, sector2=sector_10, asset=asset_04)" — an assertion recorded as fct_1026 that the desk has yet to corroborate.
On day 225, a partner_feed entry recorded as fct_0623 became effective, valid from day 225 through day 257, that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_08, asset=asset_09, customer=customer_10).

=== Episode ep_284 (day 203) ===
Day 203 brings an audit_note entry — fct_0727, valid from day 203 — showing that partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_07, sector=sector_11).
Starting day 203, policy rul_032 ("requires_review policy 1 (revised)" at authority level 5) dictates: if supplies(customer=?A, asset=asset_15) and registered_in(jurisdiction=?B, asset=asset_15, customer=?A) are both true, then requires_review(customer=?A, jurisdiction=?B) follows — unless registered_in(jurisdiction=?B, asset=asset_14, customer=customer_06) is also the case. This takes effect day 203.
Notice sup_008, issued day 203, establishes that rul_032 supersedes rul_006 effective day 203; thereafter rul_006 no longer applies.

=== Episode ep_227 (day 107) ===
In The Visiting Clerk, day 107 brings word that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_16, asset=asset_04, customer=customer_12) — noted as fct_0956.
On day 107, product_14 projects that operates_in(customer=customer_06, sector=sector_08, customer2=customer_06) will hold — recorded as fct_1035.

=== Episode ep_076 (day 20) ===
Logged from partner_feed on day 19 and valid from day 19, fct_0619 records that classified_as(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_01, partner=partner_15).
The partner_feed posting of day 19, effective day 19, carries fct_0851: registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_08, asset=asset_15, customer=customer_01).
